improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners and traders. Instant answers, voice chat, unlimited workspace. Start with 3 free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description under 160 characters improves click-through rates from search results by clearly stating the value proposition and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the page is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B trust. Including the pricing entry point and free searches creates urgency without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for business owners and professionals. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces Gideon by name and clearly states what it is, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while addressing the target audience directly. Ending with the free trial offer and removing friction (no card required) encourages immediate engagement and reduces hesitation.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan to continue. Plans start at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30 percent with an annual subscription. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited access to Gideon's workspace, voice chat, and full trade and business support.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point for trial users—understanding what happens at the paywall. It transparently explains the transition, reinforces value, and presents pricing clearly without pressure, building trust and reducing abandonment at the conversion moment.
